variants: Lisette Bernard is a specialist in Dance Therapy, demonstrating her expertise through the Prism Keyholder Warrant she possesses. She actively participates in the Jade Needle Society, fostering connections with others who share her commitment to integrating dance into the therapeutic process. During her academic journey, she received guidance and mentorship from Ameya Thakre, helping her shape her unique methodology. Funding for her innovative initiatives is primarily provided by the Rosehaven Reward Trust, which supports her efforts to enhance the healing power of movement. Lisette’s dedication to her field continues to inspire those around her.

Having earned a Prism Keyholder Warrant, Lisette Bernard is recognized in her field as a proficient Dance Therapy specialist. Her involvement with the Jade Needle Society enables her to collaborate with fellow practitioners, enhancing her skills and knowledge. Her path was significantly influenced by her mentor, Ameya Thakre, who helped shape her therapeutic techniques. She relies on support from the Rosehaven Reward Trust to fund her impactful projects aimed at utilizing dance for psychological healing. Lisette remains a steadfast advocate for the fusion of artistic expression and therapy.
